title: Equipment context required
message: The displayed code matches multiple runtime equipment contexts. Select the installed equipment context.

clarificationQuestion.prompt: Which equipment context shows this code?

options.label: Gree Chiller (Chiller)
options.explanation: E1 is present in the runtime catalog for Chiller Chiller.
options.followUpPrompt: Confirm Gree Chiller (Chiller) and resend E1 with that context.

options.label: Gree GMV (Outdoor)
options.explanation: E1 is present in the runtime catalog for GMV Outdoor.
options.followUpPrompt: Confirm Gree GMV (Outdoor) and resend E1 with that context.

safetyCard.boundary: Use this guidance for preliminary review only. Qualified technician review is required; keep safety protections active.
notes: Stop and escalate when equipment identity cannot be confirmed.

warnings: Do not select a diagnostic case until the equipment context is confirmed.
